question: How many number of products does each gender of customers buy? List the gender and the number
sql: SELECT Customers.gender_code, COUNT(Order_Items.order_item_id) AS product_count FROM Customers JOIN Orders ON Customers.customer_id = Orders.customer_id JOIN Order_Items ON Orders.order_id = Order_Items.order_id GROUP BY Customers.gender_code;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个性别代码对应的订单项数量

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题询问每个性别的客户购买的产品数量，SQL反向翻译描述统计每个性别代码对应的订单项数量，符合要求。
